stories.title: Sorsby bet on IU at least 40 times as Hoosiers QB
stories.summary: Brendan Sorsby placed at least 40 bets involving Indiana football as a QB for the Hoosiers and used sportsbook accounts registered to a family member and friends to wager approximately $90,000 over four years, according to court documents filed Friday.

stories.title: Carter, Dart express unity after Trump dispute
stories.summary: Giants teammates Jaxson Dart and Abdul Carter expressed solidarity Friday following their "disagreement" over the quarterback's involvement in an event for President Donald Trump.

stories.title: OKC to be without injured Williams for Game 7
stories.summary: Thunder wing Jalen Williams, who has been hampered by injuries all season, will not play in Saturday's Game 7 against the Spurs.

stories.title: Sources: Giants fear Olszewski has torn Achilles
stories.summary: Giants wide receiver Gunner Olszewski went down Friday during OTAs with a noncontact injury that the team fears is a torn Achilles tendon, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Big 12 first P4 conference in full CSC agreement
stories.summary: The Big 12 is becoming the first Power Four conference to have each of its members sign participation agreements with the College Sports Commission.
